prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `c97c0139`.
codex_response:
Implemented `c97c0139` with a task-local taper helper in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c97c0139/helpers.py#L1), a RE-ARC-style verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c97c0139/verifier.py#L1), and a constructive generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c97c0139/generator.py#L1), wired by [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_c97c0139/__init__.py#L1). The rule is: keep each red straight line unchanged, then add sky-blue parallel bands on both perpendicular sides, trimming one cell from both ends at each step so the result is a diamond around the line. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or `arc2/dsl_ext.py` change was needed.

The generator matches the family by sampling 1-3 separated horizontal/vertical red line segments, deriving the blue diamonds directly from the same latent line structure, and cropping to variable rectangular grids with similar spacing/margins to the official task.

Validation passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task c97c0139` -> `3/3` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task c97c0139 --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c97c0139/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c97c0139/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c97c0139/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c97c0139/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/c97c0139/previews/preview_03.png)
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task c97c0139` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed
